def negative_numpy_python_loop_over_array():
    rule_id = "numpy_python_loop_over_array"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Python loops iterate directly over arrays where vectorized NumPy operations would be clearer and faster."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
